description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and forearm, complemented by a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The stock is straight and fixed, providing a traditional look and stable shooting platform. The barrel is long and slender, with a front sight post and a simple iron rear sight, suitable for accurate mid-range shooting. The magazine is a detachable box type, protruding slightly below the receiver. The trigger guard and bolt handle are visible, indicating a semi-automatic or bolt-action mechanism. The overall finish is a combination of polished wood grain and matte metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance.
description: A traditional rifle with a wooden stock, long black barrel, and detachable box magazine, featuring iron sights and a classic, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and protruding magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, barrel, and magazine, mirroring the details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the slim width of the stock and barrel, with the iron sights aligned along the top.
